title: The Cursed Mod
description: this is a mod that adds cursed items and it doesn't do much(for now) but later on this mod will become more and more cursed
body:
# About the mod

this mod makes the game minecraft cursed by adding so many things that shouldnt be in minecraft by anyway

### About the dev (me)
so yea i got no other devs helping me but hey the mod keeps growing more and more!
